## Tier candidate

- [ ] `core` — permissively licensed (MIT / Apache-2.0 / CC-BY-4.0 / CC-BY-SA-4.0)
- [ ] `extended` — non-commercial (CC-BY-NC-4.0 / CC-BY-NC-SA-4.0)
- [ ] other (explain)

## Redistribution check

- [ ] I have verified the upstream LICENSE.
- [ ] The dataset is publicly accessible without login.
- [ ] There are no known sensitive data (PII, production system logs, etc.).
- [ ] Attribution instructions are documented upstream and can be preserved.
